home.title: WangHai Server
home.description: Player-centered, bringing the joy of the game back to players — a free Minecraft community integrating rail transit, building, and redstone.

whs_concept.core_concept: " Player-centered, bringing the joy of gaming back to players
whs_concept.summary_p: No hectic task assignments, no performance reviews — only the
whs_concept.summary_strong: freedom to pursue what you love

events.title: WangHai Commune Founded
events.desc: A group of Minecraft enthusiasts gathered under the name 'Commune', beginning a journey of free building and exploration in vanilla survival.

events.title: Season 1 · Infrastructure Boom
events.desc: The first rail transit line opened, major settlements took shape. Redstone tech infrastructure grew from scratch into a full industrial cluster.

events.title: Season 2 · A New Beginning
events.desc: Rebranded as 'WangHai Server' with a renewed vision. Upgraded hardware, greater gameplay freedom, and fresh horizons.

events.title: Steady Growth · Bright Future
events.desc: Rail network continues expanding, tech infrastructure fully upgraded. New district development underway, community steadily growing.

current_items: 🛤️ Multiple Vanilla Rail Lines —— Operational, connecting major settlements
⚡ Full Tech Infrastructure —— Farms, mob grinders, auto-storage, crafting stations
🏗️ Complete Redstone Machine Cluster & Supply System
📊 High-Performance Server: yizexiaomu hardware, low-latency stable TPS
future_items: 🚄 Rail Network Expansion Planning —— New loop lines & intercity express
🏭 Tech Cluster Upgrade In Progress —— Next-gen item sorter & multi-dimension engineering
🏙️ New District Development Design Phase —— Modern architecture meets natural landscape
🎮 Mod/Modpack Events Seasonal —— Special holiday gameplay for the community
📖 Server Official Website & Community Map Co-building —— Documenting our history & projects
